effect_10003.Desc:
You are covered in lemon juice and it is super sticky! Your movements are hindered and you stick to everything, including the ground!
You lose 3 movement speed and 2 sprint speed.
You need to bathe in water to remove the stickiness!
effect_10003.Name: Sticky!

effect_10005.Desc:
You have been blessed with the luck of the lemon!
You have an extra 5% chance to find legendary gear!
effect_10005.Name: Luck of the Legendary Lemon

effect_10010.Desc: Your inventory capacity is expanded by 25 slots for 3 hours. This effect does not stack with other inventory expansion potions from Orran and overrides all inventory Words of Power.
effect_10010.Name: Orran's Inventory Expander
